title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at SOTC Travel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at SOTC Travel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, SOTC Travel in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SOTC Travel:
SOTC Travel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SOTC Travel!
